name: Klue
one_liner: AI-powered competitive enablement platform that collects, curates, and delivers competitive intelligence and win-loss insights to help enterprise revenue teams win more deals.

ambiguities: Total funding reported as $81M by Tracxn/PitchBook/Owler across 3 equity rounds (Seed 2017, Series A ~2020, Series B Dec 2021 $62M); growjo.com reported $367M which appears erroneous and was excluded.
Headcount is uncertain post-40% layoff (reported by BetaKit, date unspecified in 2025); LeadIQ reported ~215 employees as of Oct 2025, used as best estimate.
Crunchbase notes a subsequent Grant round (Pacific Economic Development Canada / Salesforce Ventures) after Series B, amount obfuscated; Series B remains the last disclosed equity round.
Klue acquired DoubleCheck Research (Jan 2023), Goldpan (Mar 2025), and Ignition GTM (Sep 2025) per PitchBook/Tracxn.
growth_12mo_pct set to null due to 40% layoff event making year-over-year headcount growth unreliable.
